scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-voicings build && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-core build && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-react build && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-board build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-voicings test && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-core test && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-react test
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-voicings test:run && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-core test:run && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-react test:run
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-voicings lint && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-core lint && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-react lint && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/chordl-board lint
